landing.heroSubtitle: A professional community connecting Sudanese professionals, entrepreneurs, and creatives in KSA's Eastern Region. Grow your network, find mentors, and build your future.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to grow professionally and connect with your community
landing.feature1Desc: Connect with Sudanese professionals across industries in the Eastern Region.
landing.feature2Desc: Get matched with experienced mentors who understand your journey.
landing.feature3Desc: Attend exclusive events, workshops, and networking sessions.
landing.feature4Desc: Access curated content, job opportunities, and career guidance.
landing.feature5Desc: A supportive space to share experiences and lift each other up.
landing.feature6Desc: Fully available in both Arabic and English for everyone.
landing.tracksSubtitle: Find your community within the community
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of Sudanese professionals building their future in the Eastern Region.

auth.signupSubtitle: Create your account and connect with the community
auth.agreeTerms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy
auth.profileSetupSubtitle: Tell us about yourself so we can connect you with the right people
